channel.title: Jenkins on Your Name - Developer Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Jenkins on Your Name - Developer Portfolio

item.title: Getting Started with Jenkins: CI/CD Pipeline Automation
item.description:
What is Jenkins?

Jenkins is an open-source automation server that helps developers build, test, and deploy software continuously. It’s one of the most widely adopted tools in the DevOps ecosystem, powering CI/CD pipelines for teams of all sizes.

Why Jenkins?

  • Open Source — Free, community-driven, and battle-tested since 2011
  • Plugin Ecosystem — 1,800+ plugins for virtually any integration
  • Pipeline as Code — Define your entire build pipeline in a Jenkinsfile
  • Distributed Builds — Scale across multiple agents/nodes
  • Language Agnostic — Works with Java, Python, Go, Node.js, and more

Installation

Using Docker (Recommended)

docker run -d \
  --name jenkins \
  -p 8080:8080 \
  -p 50000:50000 \
  -v jenkins_home:/var/jenkins_home \
  jenkins/jenkins:lts

Retrieve the initial admin password:
